name: Cherry Almond Glazed Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Rub the roast with a little salt and pepper.
2. Place it on a rack in a shallow baking pan.
3. Roast uncovered at 325°F (160°C) for about 2 to 2 1/2 hours.
4. Meanwhile, combine cherry preserves, corn syrup, vinegar, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves in a saucepan.
5. Heat the mixture to boiling, stirring frequently, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 more minutes.
6. Add toasted almonds and keep the sauce warm.
7. When the meat has roasted for the specified time, spoon enough hot cherry sauce over the roast to glaze.
8. Return to the oven for about 30 minutes longer, or until a meat thermometer reads 170°F (77°C).
9. Baste the roast with the sauce several times during the last 30 minutes.
10. Pass remaining sauce with the roast.
